title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Announcements

2025-2026 Fall Semester Single Course and Grade Enhancement Exams

21
						January

2026

Dear Students,

Applications for the 2025-2026 Fall Semester Single Course or Grade Enhancement Exam will be done by January 30, 2026 until 17:00 p.m. To apply for the single course or grade enhancement exam students must fill in the "

Single Course Exam Application Petition

" or “

Application Petition to Increase Grade Exam

” available on the website and submit to the Faculty Secretariat in person.

The exams of the students whose single course or grade enhancement exam applications are accepted will be held on February 5 , 2026. 11.00am The students who are eligible to take single course or grade enhancement exam will be informed by e-mail, hence it is vital to check your e-mail boxes.

Good luck

en

tr
